summary: Full backend+frontend testing for RevvCars MVP. 24/24 pytest cases passed covering cars, leads, bookings, Stripe checkout Flow B, payment status, admin JWT auth, admin CRUD, auth session (via mocked Mongo session token). UI happy paths verified: landing (hero, 6 featured cars, lead form toast), /cars filters + 10 cars, car detail, booking with live quote (₹2,998), checkout page with Pay button, admin login + dashboard (Cars/Bookings/Leads tabs, Add car).

issues: Seed car images from Unsplash don't visually match the branded car (e.g., Maruti Swift shows a generic blue sedan). Consider curated brand-matching images.

action_items: Optional: use more accurate car images matching the brand/model in SEED_CARS.

Optional: search widget on landing does not always propagate the selected city to /cars URL when a Radix Select value is chosen quickly; defaults to Delhi. Not blocking (city can be changed on cars page).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py exceeds 630 lines; consider splitting routers (cars, bookings, payments, admin, auth) into modules.
ADMIN_JWT_SECRET falls back to a hardcoded default when env var is missing — enforce required env in production.
/api/webhook/stripe signature verification depends on emergentintegrations lib; add integration test with Stripe test-mode webhook if possible.
get_payment_status polls Stripe on every call for pending sessions; consider caching or rate-limiting to avoid excessive API hits.
seed_data_creation: Auto-seed of 10 cars on backend startup verified. Created 1 TEST_ lead + 1 TEST_ booking + 1 TEST_ car (deleted) during pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Admin uses X-Admin-Token header (JWT). Emergent Google Auth full flow was tested by mocking a MongoDB user_sessions doc + Authorization: Bearer <token> per /app/auth_testing.md pattern; the /api/auth/me endpoint accepts Bearer tokens as fallback to cookie. Stripe checkout uses emergentintegrations Flow B and returns valid checkout_url + session_id.
